title: Precedence tests cases 1-4
task: Implement tests/resolveCategory.test.js with node:test + assert. Cover case-1-account-wins, case-2-auto-cat-wins, case-3-ai-wins, case-4-account-beats-ai using createForTest stub wiring per architecture AC-2 matrix. Assert messages name case id and expected vs actual category.
acceptance: Four required precedence cases pass via node --test
case-2 asserts classify not called; case-4 asserts classify.mock.callCount() === 0
case-3 asserts classify called once with mapped description args
Failure messages include case id (e.g. case-2-auto-cat-wins) and expected vs actual
Remove tests/_poc/ if present after green
